seo.metaTitle: White-Label Local Listings Management for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Launch local listings management under your brand. OneList Plus distributes accurate business data across Google, Bing, Facebook, Yelp, and more — driving SMB visibility and retention.

hero.headline: Accurate Listings Everywhere — Managed from One Dashboard
hero.subheadline: Inconsistent business listings kill search visibility, erode customer trust, and cost SMBs foot traffic. Most can't keep up with dozens of directories manually.
hero.description: OneList Plus distributes and syncs accurate business information across Google, Bing, Facebook, Yelp, and other major directories — automatically. Delivered white-label under your brand as a recurring subscription that drives retention and ARPU.

items.title: One update, everywhere
items.body: Change business info, hours, or categories once — it syncs automatically across all connected directories.

items.title: Always-on accuracy
items.body: Continuous sync suppresses duplicates, corrects errors, and keeps data consistent across every platform.

items.title: Visibility reporting
items.body: Monthly reports show listing status, reach, and health across all directories — proof that the subscription is working.

items.title: Better local SEO
items.body: Consistent citations are foundational to local search ranking. Accurate listings everywhere = better map and search visibility.

heroImage.alt: OneList Plus directory listings dashboard hero

features.heading: Local Presence Management — Under Your Brand
features.intro: OneList Plus handles the distribution, sync, and monitoring that SMBs can't manage on their own. You get a recurring revenue product with minimal support overhead.

cards.title: Major Directory Distribution
cards.body: Automated distribution to Google, Bing, Facebook, Yelp, and other top directories. SMBs get listed where their customers are searching.

cards.title: Continuous Sync & Correction
cards.body: Always-on synchronization suppresses duplicates, overwrites incorrect data, and ensures every listing stays accurate without manual intervention.

cards.title: Centralized Management
cards.body: One branded dashboard to update business name, address, hours, categories, and descriptions across all connected platforms simultaneously.

cards.title: Automated Health Reporting
cards.body: Monthly reports on listing status, reach, and consistency — giving SMBs visibility and giving your team data for retention conversations.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Low-Support, High-Margin Recurring Revenue
partnerAdvantage.intro: OneList Plus is one of the easiest digital products to sell and one of the hardest to cancel — because the value is visible and always-on.

items.title: High attach with web products
items.body: Every website customer benefits from accurate listings. Bundle OneList Plus with websites, SEO, and reputation management for stronger product attachment.

items.title: Retention through visibility
items.body: SMBs see their listings stay accurate month after month. That ongoing, measurable value makes cancellation a hard decision.

items.title: Scale without support overhead
items.body: Automated sync and distribution means no manual fulfillment, no directory relationship management, and minimal support tickets.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Foundation of Local Discoverability
lifecycleFit.intro: Accurate listings are prerequisite to effective SEO and reputation management. OneList Plus is the base layer of your 'Get Found' stack.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Websites and hosting launch their digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: OneList Plus ensures accurate listings everywhere, strengthening SEO and reputation efforts.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and advanced services drive revenue growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position directories as the always-on visibility product that makes SEO and reputation management work harder — a natural bundle with Search Everywhere Optimization and Reviews Promoter.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn Local Listings into Recurring Revenue?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch OneList Plus under your brand, bundle it with your web and marketing portfolio, and give SMBs always-on visibility across the directories that matter most.
